title: Bare Essence of Life Ultra-Miracle Love Story
original_title: ウルトラミラクルラブストーリー
overview: Yojin, an eccentric young farmer living in the countryside, falls in love for the first time in his life. Her name is Machiko, she teaches in a kindergarten and is from Tokyo.
